surface.name: Private Access Quick Start
surface.selection_basis: Official Quick Start is the general private-access onboarding: free account, Remote Network, Resource, Connector deploy, Client install, then access the Resource.

alternatives_considered.name: Automated Deployment
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Alternative to the manual Quick Start.

alternatives_considered.name: API getting started
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Assumes existing tenant and API key.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Twingate account, deploy a Connector, install the Client, and access a private Resource.
assumed_prior_state: Permission to run Docker or a Linux Connector on a host that can reach the Resource.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Access your protected Resources with the Twingate Client
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Authenticated Client can reach the configured private Resource address.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: From the Client device, the Resource hostname/address is reachable as documented after Connector is connected.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Quick Start ends Install the Client with access to the configured Resource and Congratulations.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: First success is private Resource access via Client, not admin UI setup alone.

prerequisites.requirement: Host permissions to deploy Connector (Docker or native Linux) with reachability to the Resource.

primary_path.action: Create a free Twingate account and open the admin console.
Add a Remote Network (or use one from signup) and Add Resource; assign Everyone (or a Group).
primary_path.success_signal: Resource listed under the Remote Network.

primary_path.action: Deploy a Connector on a host that can reach the Resource using the console deployment instructions.
primary_path.success_signal: Connection Status shows Connector connected to Controller and Relay.

primary_path.action: Install the Twingate Client from get.twingate.com and sign in.
Access the Resource address from the Client device.

friction_gates.description: Connector host must reach private Resources and Twingate infrastructure.
